name: Lamech
oracleText:
Menace
Whenever a creature you control dies, Lamech deals 1 damage to each opponent.
Whenever Lamech is dealt damage, create a Treasure token.
flavorText: "If Cain shall be avenged sevenfold, truly Lamech seventy and sevenfold." — Genesis 4:24

image.artist: anonymous printmaker after Hans Sebald Beham

notes: Early World secondary figure card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for Lamech met zijn vrouw en kinderen.
title: Voice Before the Flood

classics.artist: anonymous printmaker after Hans Sebald Beham
